title: Diabetes Screening * Native American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Diabetes Screening * Native American Community 2 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NATIVE AMERICAN REHABILITATION ASSOCIATION OF THE NORTHWEST NARA NW INDIAN HEALTH CLINIC HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of general medical care, immunizations, mental health evaluations and counseling services, diabetes testing, sexually transmitted infections testing and treatment, breast cancer screening, tobacco cessation programs, addictions assessment and treatment, and Oregon Health Plan (OHP) eligibility assistance. 703 NE Hancock Street Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Native American or Alaskan Native or other vulnerable populations Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-7pm Email (503) 230-9875 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIVE AMERICAN REHABILITATION ASSOCIATION OF THE NORTHWEST NARA NW WELLNESS CENTER HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of general medical care, immunizations, mental health evaluations and counseling services, diabetes testing, sexually transmitted infections testing and treatment, breast cancer screening, tobacco cessation programs, addictions assessment and treatment, and Oregon Health Plan (OHP) eligibility assistance. 12360 E Burnside Street 2nd Floor Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Native American or Alaskan Native or other vulnerable populations Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-7pm Email (971) 279-4800 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIVE AMERICAN REHABILITATION ASSOCIATION OF THE NORTHWEST HEALTH SERVICES NATIVE AMERICAN REHABILITATION ASSOCIATION OF THE NORTHWEST HEALTH SERVICES
